name: Mulligatawny Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked white or brown rice, sliced
recipeInstructions:
This soup originated in India. Mulligatawny means "pepper water."
Serve hot or cold.
1. Combine all the ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Cook, uncovered, over medium heat for 30-40 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
